headlines.headline: Zrovov Advisors wins industry award for excellence in supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Winning an industry award provides positive brand recognition but has no direct or quantifiable impact on financial results.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
